title: EmoBox - Multilingual Speech Emotion Recognition
description: Multilingual speech emotion recognition across multiple languages and corpora. Annotators classify emotional states in speech clips and rate emotional intensity, based on the EmoBox toolkit and benchmark (Ma et al., INTERSPEECH 2024).
citation:
@inproceedings{ma24_interspeech,
    title = "{E}mo{B}ox: Multilingual Multi-corpus Speech Emotion Recognition Toolkit and Benchmark",
    author = "Ma, Ziyang and Zheng, Mingjie and Ye, Hezhao and others",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2024",
    year = "2024",
    publisher = "ISCA",
    url = "https://www.isca-archive.org/interspeech_2024/ma24_interspeech.html"
}
